title: angolluma taitica
intro: Angolluma taitica is a succulent plant native to Peru, belonging to the Apocynaceae family, and is also known as the "Peruvian milkflower". Traditionally, Angolluma taitica has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The plant is said to have several health benefits, such as promoting wound healing, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Angolluma taitica can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in some herbal preparations, including creams and ointments, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
